images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑influencer, flawless yet lifelike skin with visible pores and fine vellus hair illuminated by the bright, clear glow of a monitor screen. She wears a tailored ivory silk blazer, slightly unbuttoned to reveal a sheer lace camisole beneath, the blazer’s crisp lapels and slim shoulders hugging her curvy silhouette; paired with a high‑waist black pencil skirt that clings to her hips and thighs, the skirt’s hem ending just above the knee to accentuate her slender waist and ample bust. The scene is set in a narrow red‑brick alleyway, background turned to soft bokeh that fades into a dreamy pink haze. Eye‑level shot captures her gentle soft smile, her expressive dark eyes meeting the lens as if engaging her fans. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑traced lighting, and global illumination deliver a vibrant pink color grade and avant‑garde artistic atmosphere.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese idol‑style model, early‑twenties, flawless yet realistic skin with visible pores and gentle vellus hair, large expressive eyes that sparkle under colorful gel lighting, a cute yet seductive face framed by straight, silky black hair that falls past her shoulders. She sports a playful nurse‑inspired look— a crisp white cropped top with a subtle lace trim, a tiny high‑waisted skirt that hugs her curvy silhouette, and sheer white knee‑high socks— underneath a flowing, waist‑cinching camel trench coat draped casually open to reveal the outfit’s flirtatious lines. The coat is made of lightweight, slightly luminous fabric, emphasizing her slim waist and ample bust. She stands in the bright, neon‑lit aisles of a modern convenience store, the shelves softened by a dreamy bokeh that bursts with pink, cyan, and amber gel light. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑traced lighting, global illumination, and a vibrant high‑saturation color grade that lends a dreamy, soft focus while the model gazes straight into the lens, lips glossy, cheeks flushed, exuding confidence and allure.8k photo, Large breasts
